summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pasteçaria Degrau Azul Portuguese café website. All core functionality working correctly including homepage sections, menu filtering, contact form, admin panel with CRUD operations, and API endpoints.

minor_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle and Description for accessibility
minor_issues.impact: Accessibility warnings in browser console for dialog components

design_issues.issue: Navbar data-testid not found during testing

accessibility_issues.issue: Missing DialogTitle and aria-describedby for screen readers

passed_tests: All 19 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Menu, About, Gallery, Location, Contact, Footer)
Navigation links work with smooth scroll functionality
Menu section displays 4 categories (Pastelaria, Cafetaria, Salgados, Bebidas)
Category filtering works correctly - clicking categories shows respective items
Contact form submission works (both contact and order types)
Gallery section displays 3 images with working lightbox functionality
Social media links present in footer (Instagram, Facebook)
Google Maps embed working in location section
Admin login works with correct credentials (admin@degrauazul.pt / degrauazul2024)
Admin dashboard loads with all tabs (Menu, Categories, Messages, Gallery)
Admin can create new menu items with category selection
Admin can create new gallery items
All CRUD operations for menu items, categories, and gallery working
